## Cert

## Topic / Chapter

What topic or chapter does this cover?

## Source material

- [ ] YouTube playlist transcript (provide URL)
- [ ] Personal notes (rewritten in VIRGIL style)

Source URL or title:

## Notes

Attach `.md` files or paste content below.

All contributions must follow the VIRGIL note structure — see
`starter-notes/knowledge/aplus/A+CORE1-02-Laptop-Hardware.md` as the
gold standard: Analogy before definition, Exam Tips section, Common
Mistakes section, wikilinks on every technical term.
